description:
Enpass is a cross-platform password management app to securely store passwords and other credentials in a virtual vault locked with a master password. Unlike most other popular password managers, Enpass is an offline password manager.


Autofill while locked The desktop app now serves cached autofill items metadata to the browser extension even when locked and requires to unlock Enpass when an item is selected for filling. Requires Enpass browser Extension v6.11.14
Added support for Conditional Passkey Sign-in and Enrollment The desktop app now supports the underlying passkey handling required for conditional passkey sign-in and password-to-passkey enrollment flows initiated from the browser extension.
Passkey Management Links Enpass now reads website-provided well-known passkey URLs to surface the right actions at the right time. When a site declares where users can enroll or manage their passkeys, Enpass shows the appropriate buttons directly in the app.
Improved SharePoint vault sharing by increasing the supported member limit for shared SharePoint sites from 1,000 to 5,000 users, enabling vault sharing with larger groups.
